# wayyFinance Documentation
> https://github.com/Wayy-Research/wayyfinance-docs
> 6 open-source libraries for quantitative finance

## Overview
- [Ecosystem](overview/ecosystem.md): All 6 libraries, decision tree
- [Architecture](overview/architecture.md): Data flow, shared conventions
- [Getting Started](overview/getting-started.md): Zero to first workflow
- [Installation](overview/installation.md): Per-package install guide

## Package References
- [wrdata](packages/wrdata/reference.md): Data from 32+ providers (v0.1.6)
- [fractime](packages/fractime/reference.md): Fractal forecasting & regimes (v0.7.0)
- [wrtrade](packages/wrtrade/reference.md): Backtesting & trading (v2.1.1)
- [wrchart](packages/wrchart/reference.md): Python charting (v0.2.0)
- [wrchart-js](packages/wrchart-js/reference.md): React charting (v0.2.0)
- [wayy-db](packages/wayydb/reference.md): Time-series database (v0.1.0)

## Cookbooks
- [01 Data to Forecast](cookbooks/01-data-to-forecast.py): wrdata + fractime + wrchart
- [02 Backtest Strategy](cookbooks/02-backtest-strategy.py): wrdata + wrtrade
- [03 Regime-Aware Trading](cookbooks/03-regime-aware-trading.py): fractime regimes + wrtrade
- [04 Realtime Streaming](cookbooks/04-realtime-streaming.py): wrdata WebSocket streaming
- [05 Whale Detection](cookbooks/05-whale-detection.py): Binance whale tracking
- [06 Options Analysis](cookbooks/06-options-analysis.py): wrdata options + fractime vol
- [07 TimeSeries DB](cookbooks/07-timeseries-db.py): wrdata + wayyDB as-of joins
- [08 Multi-Asset Screener](cookbooks/08-multi-asset-screener.py): Hurst screening

## Guides
- [For LLMs](guides/for-llms.md): How to use this repo as LLM context
- [Quant Pitfalls](guides/quant-pitfalls.md): Lookahead bias, floats, timezones
- [API Keys](guides/api-keys.md): Provider keys, .env template
- [Data Providers](guides/data-providers.md): 32+ providers with rate limits

## Full Reference
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): All references concatenated (auto-generated)
